name: compliance closed-loop validation fails with a clear error when the manifest step is broken
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/closed-loop-validate.sh" --synthetic-framework test-fw --simulate-failure manifest 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'failed_step=manifest' err.txt && grep -q 'pipeline_broken' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
